name: Fivetran
description: Monitor Fivetran data pipeline connectors and user access for data integration compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Fivetran Dashboard
2. Click your username in the top right
3. Click API Key
4. Generate an API key (or generate a new one)
5. Note down both the API Key and API Secret
6. Enter them below

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Fivetran account users and their access roles
